things.name: Paphos Archaeological Park
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage site with extraordinary Roman floor mosaics of Dionysus, Theseus and Orpheus

things.name: Tombs of the Kings
things.description: UNESCO-listed underground rock-cut tombs used by Ptolemaic aristocracy from the 4th century BC

things.name: Aphrodite's Rock (Petra tou Romiou)
things.description: Legendary birthplace of Aphrodite - a spectacular sea stack on the coastal road

things.name: Paphos Castle
things.description: Medieval Byzantine castle at the harbour entrance, converted into a wine store by the Ottomans

things.name: Kato Paphos Harbour
things.description: Picturesque old harbour with fishing boats, fish restaurants and the castle

things.name: Akamas Peninsula National Park
things.description: Wild headland with the Aphrodite Trail, Blue Lagoon at Agios Georgios and sea turtles

things.name: Kouklia (Old Paphos)
things.description: Site of the great Sanctuary of Aphrodite and the Lusignan manor house museum

things.name: Coral Bay Beach
things.description: Excellent sandy beach north of Paphos with watersports and beach clubs

things.name: St Neophytos Monastery
things.description: 12th-century monastery carved into a cliff with remarkable Byzantine frescoes

things.name: Troodos Mountains & Kykkos Monastery
things.description: Day trip to Cyprus's highest peaks with Byzantine painted churches and the richest monastery
